        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n      ...\n\n      \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4 mt-6\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cspan className=\"text-sm font-medium\"\u003e{selectedKOLs.length} selected:\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-wrap items-end gap-2\"\u003e\n          {/* Platform */}\n          \u003cdiv className=\"min-w-[120px] flex flex-col items-end justify-end\"\u003e\n            \u003cspan className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-semibold mb-1 self-start\"\u003ePlatform\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"w-full flex items-center h-7 min-h-[28px] justify-start\"\u003e\n              \u003cMultiSelect\n                options={fieldOptions.platforms || []}\n                selected={bulkEdit.platform || []}\n                onSelectedChange={platform =\u003e setBulkEdit(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, platform }))}\n                placeholder=\"Platform\"\n                className=\"w-full\"\n                triggerContent={\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"w-full flex items-center h-7 min-h-[28px]\"\u003e\n                    {bulkEdit.platform \u0026\u0026 bulkEdit.platform.length \u003e 0 ?         "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n                ...\n\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{ maxWidth: '100px' }}\u003e\n                  \u003cSelect \n                    value={newKOLData.community ? 'yes' : 'no'} \n                    onValueChange={(value) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, community: value === 'yes' }))}\n                  \u003e\n                    \u003cSelectTrigger \n                      className={&#96;border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-full h-auto px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none data-[state=open]:outline-none data-[state=open]:ring-0 data-[state=open]:border-none ${newKOLData.community !== undefined ? (newKOLData.community ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800') : ''}&#96;}\n                      style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}\n                    \u003e\n                      \u003cSelectValue placeholder=\"Community\" /\u003e\n                    \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectContent\u003e\n                      \u003cSelectItem value=\"yes\"\u003eYes\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                      \u003cSelectItem value=\"no\"\u003eNo\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                    \u003c/SelectContent\u003e\n                  \u003c/Select\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cTextarea\n                    value={newKOLData.description || ''}\n                    onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}\n                    placeholder=\"Description...\"\n                    className=\"min-w-32 w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent resize-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\"\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{ maxWidth: '100px' }}\u003e\n                  \u003cSelect \n                    value={newKOLData.community ? 'yes' : 'no'} \n                    onValueChange={(value) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, community: value === 'yes' }))}\n                  \u003e\n                    \u003cSelectTrigger \n                      className={&#96;border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-full h-auto px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none data-[state=open]:outline-none data-[state=open]:ring-0 data-[state=open]:border-none ${newKOLData.community !== undefined ? (newKOLData.community ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800') : ''}&#96;}\n                      style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}\n                    \u003e\n                      \u003cSelectValue placeholder=\"Community\" /\u003e\n                    \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectContent\u003e\n                      \u003cSelectItem value=\"yes\"\u003eYes\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                      \u003cSelectItem value=\"no\"\u003eNo\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                    \u003c/SelectContent\u003e\n                  \u003c/Select\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cTextarea\n                    value={newKOLData.description || ''}\n                    onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, description: e.target.value }))}\n                    placeholder=\"Description...\"\n                    className=\"min-w-32 w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent resize-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\"\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function KOLsPage() {\n  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const [kols, setKols] = useState\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\n  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState\u003c{kolId: string, field: keyof MasterKOL} | null\u003e(null);\n  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState\u003cany\u003e(null);\n  const [isAddingNew, setIsAddingNew] = useState(false);\n  const [newKOLData, setNewKOLData] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL \u0026 { verifiedFollowers?: boolean }\u003e\u003e({\n    name: '',\n    platform: [],\n    content_type: [],\n    niche: [],\n    community: false,\n    group_chat: false,\n    verifiedFollowers: false\n  });\n  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedKOLs, setSelectedKOLs] = useState\u003cstring[]\u003e([]);\n  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [isBulkDeleting, setIsBulkDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const fieldOptions = KOLService.getFieldOptions();",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function KOLsPage() {\n  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const [kols, setKols] = useState\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\n  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState\u003c{kolId: string, field: keyof MasterKOL} | null\u003e(null);\n  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState\u003cany\u003e(null);\n  const [isAddingNew, setIsAddingNew] = useState(false);\n  const [newKOLData, setNewKOLData] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL \u0026 { verifiedFollowers?: boolean }\u003e\u003e({\n    name: '',\n    platform: [],\n    content_type: [],\n    niche: [],\n    community: false,\n    group_chat: false,\n    verifiedFollowers: false\n  });\n  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedKOLs, setSelectedKOLs] = useState\u003cstring[]\u003e([]);\n  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [isBulkDeleting, setIsBulkDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const fieldOptions = KOLService.getFieldOptions();",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n                ...\n\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden group\" style={{ maxWidth: '100px' }}\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center\"\u003e\n                    \u003cInput\n                      type=\"number\"\n                      value={newKOLData.followers || ''}\n                      onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, followers: parseInt(e.target.value) || null }))}\n                      placeholder=\"0\"\n                      className=\"w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\"\n                      style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{ maxWidth: '100px' }}\u003e\n                  \u003cMultiSelect\n                    options={fieldOptions?.contentTypes || []}\n                    selected={Array.isArray(newKOLData.content_type) ? newKOLData.content_type : []}\n                    onSelectedChange={(selected) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, content_type: selected }))}\n                    placeholder=\"Select content types...\"\n                    triggerContent={\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center justify-between w-full cursor-pointer\"\u003e\n                        \u003cspan className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-semibold\"\u003eContent Type\u003c/span\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    }\n                    className=\"w-full\"\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e",

        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n                ...\n\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cInput\n                    value={newKOLData.link || ''}\n                    onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, link: e.target.value }))}\n                    placeholder=\"https://...\"\n                    className=\"w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent text-blue-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\"\n                    style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cMultiSelect\n                    options={fieldOptions?.platforms || []}\n                    selected={Array.isArray(newKOLData.platform) ?         "originalContents": "\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cInput\n                    value={newKOLData.link || ''}\n                    onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, link: e.target.value }))}\n                    placeholder=\"https://...\"\n                    className=\"w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent text-blue-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\"\n                    style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden\" style={{}}\u003e\n                  \u003cMultiSelect\n                    options={fieldOptions?.platforms || []}\n                    selected={Array.isArray(newKOLData.platform) ? newKOLData.platform : []}\n                    onSelectedChange={(selected) =\u003e setNewKOLData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, platform: selected }))}\n                    placeholder=\"Select platforms...\"\n                    renderOption={(option) =\u003e (\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-5 w-5\" title={option}\u003e\n                        {getPlatformIcon(option)}\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    )}\n                    triggerContent={\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center justify-between w-full cursor-pointer\"\u003e\n                        \u003cspan className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-semibold\"\u003ePlatform\u003c/span\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    }\n                    className=\"w-full\"\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/TableCell\u003e",

- Remove or reduce the **bottom margin** of the Select All button's container, and check for any **padding-top or margin-top on the table container**.
- If the table is wrapped in a div with padding or margin at the top, reduce or remove it.

**Plan:**
- Set the Select All button's container to something like `mt-4 mb-0` (or similar, so it is separated from the buttons above, but sits flush with the table).
- Check the table container for any `pt-4`, `mt-4`, or similar, and remove or reduce it.

Thank you for the screenshots! The difference is clear:

- The **Information** tab has less vertical space above the card (the horizontal line and icon are closer to the top of the white card).
- The **KOLs** tab has more vertical space above the card (the horizontal line and icon are lower, with more white space above).

### Why This Happens

This is usually due to:
- Extra `mt-4`, `p-6`, or similar margin/padding on the KOLs tab's wrapper or card.
- A difference in how the CardHeader or CardContent is structured between the two tabs.
- Possibly an extra wrapper or a missing class on one of the tabs.

### How to Fix

**Goal:**  
Make the vertical spacing above the card (between the tab line and the card's icon/header) the same for both tabs.

**What to do:**
- Compare the outermost div/className for both tabs (especially the `mt-4`, `p-6`, or any extra margin).
- Remove or adjust the `mt-4` on the KOLs tab's `<TabsContent>` or the card inside it, so it matches the Information tab.
- Ensure both tabs use the same padding and margin for their card containers.

**Example Fix:**
- If the KOLs tab has `<TabsContent className="mt-4">`, remove the `mt-4` or set it to `mt-0`.
- Make sure the card inside both tabs uses the same `p-6` and no extra margin-top.

+                       onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewKOLData(prev =&gt; ({ ...prev, rating: parseFloat(e.target.value) || null }))}
+                       placeholder="0-5"
+                       className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none"
+                       style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}
+                       min={0}
+                       max={5}
+                       step={0.1}
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/TableCell&gt;
+                   {/* Group Chat */}
                    &lt;TableCell className="bg-blue-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-2 overflow-hidden" style={{ maxWidth: '100px' }}&gt;
                      &lt;Select

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n  ...\n  const renderEditableCell =\n\n    ...\n\n    if (isEditing \u0026\u0026 (type === 'text' || type === 'number')) {\n      const getInputStyling = () =\u003e {\n        let baseStyles = \"w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\";\n        if (field === 'name') {\n          return &#96;${baseStyles} font-bold&#96;;\n        }\n        if (field === 'link') {\n          return &#96;${baseStyles} text-blue-600&#96;;\n        }\n        return &#96;${baseStyles}&#96;;\n      };\n      switch (type) {\n        case 'number':\n          return (\n            \u003cInput\n              type=\"number\"\n              value={editingValue || ''}\n              onChange={(e) =\u003e setEditingValue(parseInt(e.target.value) || null)}\n              onBlur={handleCellSave}\n              onKeyDown={(e) =\u003e {\n                if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCellSave();\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCellCancel();\n              }}\n              className={getInputStyling()}\n              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n              autoFocus\n            /\u003e\n          );\n        default:\n          return (\n            \u003cInput\n              value={editingValue || ''}\n              onChange={(e) =\u003e setEditingValue(e.target.value)}\n              onBlur={handleCellSave}\n              onKeyDown={(e) =\u003e {\n                if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCellSave();\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCellCancel();\n              }}\n              className={getInputStyling()}\n              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n              autoFocus\n            /\u003e\n          );\n      }\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\n    if (isEditing \u0026\u0026 (type === 'text' || type === 'number')) {\n      const getInputStyling = () =\u003e {\n        let baseStyles = \"w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none\";\n        if (field === 'name') {\n          return &#96;${baseStyles} font-bold&#96;;\n        }\n        if (field === 'link') {\n          return &#96;${baseStyles} text-blue-600&#96;;\n        }\n        return &#96;${baseStyles}&#96;;\n      };\n      switch (type) {\n        case 'number':\n          return (\n            \u003cInput\n              type=\"number\"\n              value={editingValue || ''}\n              onChange={(e) =\u003e setEditingValue(parseInt(e.target.value) || null)}\n              onBlur={handleCellSave}\n              onKeyDown={(e) =\u003e {\n                if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCellSave();\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCellCancel();\n              }}\n              className={getInputStyling()}\n              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n              autoFocus\n            /\u003e\n          );\n        default:\n          return (\n            \u003cInput\n              value={editingValue || ''}\n              onChange={(e) =\u003e setEditingValue(e.target.value)}\n              onBlur={handleCellSave}\n              onKeyDown={(e) =\u003e {\n                if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCellSave();\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') handleCellCancel();\n              }}\n              className={getInputStyling()}\n              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none', userSelect: 'text' }}\n              autoFocus\n            /\u003e\n          );\n      }\n    }",
        "range": {

        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cdiv className=\"mt-6 mb-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton\n            size=\"sm\"\n            variant=\"outline\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e {\n              const allIds = filteredKOLs.map(kol =\u003e kol.id);\n              if (allIds.every(id =\u003e selectedKOLs.includes(id))) {\n                setSelectedKOLs(prev =\u003e prev.filter(id =\u003e !allIds.includes(id)));\n              } else {\n                setSelectedKOLs(prev =\u003e Array.from(new Set([...prev, ...allIds])));\n              }\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            {filteredKOLs.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 filteredKOLs.every(kol =\u003e selectedKOLs.includes(kol.id)) ?       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n  ...\n  const renderEditableCell =\n\n          ...\n\n          return (\n            \u003cSelect \n              value={value || ''} \n              onValueChange={async (newValue) =\u003e {\n                const kolToUpdate = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId);\n                if (kolToUpdate) {\n                  const updatedKOL = { ...kolToUpdate, [field]: newValue };\n                  setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                    prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? updatedKOL : k)\n                  );\n                  try {\n                    await KOLService.updateKOL(updatedKOL);\n                  } catch (error) {\n                    console.error('Error updating select:', error);\n                    setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                      prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? kolToUpdate : k)\n                    );\n                  }\n                }\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003cSelectTrigger \n                className={&#96;border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${getSelectStyling()} focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none data-[state=open]:outline-none data-[state=open]:ring-0 data-[state=open]:border-none&#96;}\n                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}\n              \u003e\n                \u003cSelectValue\u003e\n                  {field === 'region' \u0026\u0026 value \u0026\u0026 (\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center space-x-1\"\u003e\n                      \u003cspan\u003e{getRegionIcon(value).flag}\u003c/span\u003e\n                      \u003cspan\u003e{value}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  )}\n                  {field !== 'region' \u0026\u0026 value}\n                \u003c/SelectValue\u003e\n              \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e",

          {

            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "              \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n          return (\n            \u003cSelect \n              value={value || ''} \n              onValueChange={async (newValue) =\u003e {\n                const kolToUpdate = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId);\n                if (kolToUpdate) {\n                  const updatedKOL = { ...kolToUpdate, [field]: newValue };\n                  setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                    prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? updatedKOL : k)\n                  );\n                  try {\n                    await KOLService.updateKOL(updatedKOL);\n                  } catch (error) {\n                    console.error('Error updating select:', error);\n                    setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                      prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? kolToUpdate : k)\n                    );\n                  }\n                }\n              }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003cSelectTrigger \n                className={&#96;border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${getSelectStyling()} focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none data-[state=open]:outline-none data-[state=open]:ring-0 data-[state=open]:border-none&#96;}\n                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}\n              \u003e\n                \u003cSelectValue\u003e\n                  {field === 'region' \u0026\u0026 value \u0026\u0026 (\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center space-x-1\"\u003e\n                      \u003cspan\u003e{getRegionIcon(value).flag}\u003c/span\u003e\n                      \u003cspan\u003e{value}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  )}\n                  {field !== 'region' \u0026\u0026 value}\n                \u003c/SelectValue\u003e\n              \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e",
        "range": {

    {

To make the "add new KOL" row styling consistent with the main table (selected/not selected):

**Key points from the main table:**
- **Boolean fields (Community, Group Chat):** Use green/red background and text when selected/not selected.
- **Select fields (Pricing, Tier):** Use dynamic color classes (`getPricingColor`, `getTierColor`) for selected values.
- **Region:** Shows flag and name, styled as `inline-flex items-center`.
- **MultiSelect (Platform, Content Type, Niche):** Show colored badges/icons for selected values, gray placeholder when empty.
- **Text fields (Name, Link):** Name is bold, Link is blue.
- **Rating:** Shows stars, yellow for selected.
- **Inputs:** Use same base classes as in `renderEditableCell`.

**What needs to be fixed in the add row:**
- Use the same dynamic class logic for all Selects and MultiSelects as in the main table.
- For Region, show flag and name when selected.
- For MultiSelect, show colored badges/icons for selected values, and gray placeholder when empty.
- For boolean selects, use green/red backgrounds.
- For Pricing/Tier, use color classes.
- For Name, use bold; for Link, use blue.
- For Rating, use star icons with yellow fill for selected.

**I will update the add new KOL row so every field matches the main table's selected/not selected styling.**

        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport class KOLService {\n  /**\n   * Get all KOLs (admin only)\n   */\n  static async getAllKOLs(): Promise\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kols, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kols || [];\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching KOLs:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { supabase } from './supabase';\n\n// TypeScript types for KOL data\nexport interface MasterKOL {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  link: string | null;\n  platform: string[];\n  followers: number | null;\n  region: 'Vietnam' | 'Turkey' | 'SEA' | 'Philippines' | 'Korea' | 'Global' | 'China' | 'Brazil' | null;\n  community: boolean;\n  content_type: string[];\n  niche: string[];\n  pricing: '\u003c$200' | '$200-500' | '$500-1K' | '$1K-2K' | '$2K-3K' | '\u003e$3K' | null;\n  tier: 'Tier 1' | 'Tier 2' | 'Tier 3' | 'Tier 4' | null;\n  rating: number | null;\n  group_chat: boolean;\n  description: string | null;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n}",

        "originalContents": "import { supabase } from './supabase';\n\n// TypeScript types for KOL data\nexport interface MasterKOL {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  link: string | null;\n  platform: string[];\n  followers: number | null;\n  region: 'Vietnam' | 'Turkey' | 'SEA' | 'Philippines' | 'Korea' | 'Global' | 'China' | 'Brazil' | null;\n  community: boolean;\n  content_type: string[];\n  niche: string[];\n  pricing: '\u003c$200' | '$200-500' | '$500-1K' | '$1K-2K' | '$2K-3K' | '\u003e$3K' | null;\n  tier: 'Tier 1' | 'Tier 2' | 'Tier 3' | 'Tier 4' | null;\n  rating: number | null;\n  group_chat: boolean;\n  description: string | null;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Update a KOL\n   */\n  static async updateKOL(kolData: UpdateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const updateData: any = { ...kolData };\n      delete updateData.id; // Remove id from update data\n\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .update(updateData)\n        .eq('id', kolData.id)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error updating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Delete a KOL\n   */\n  static async deleteKOL(kolId: string): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .delete()\n        .eq('id', kolId);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error deleting KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cdiv className=\"mt-2 flex gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton\n            size=\"sm\"\n            style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}\n            disabled={selectedKOLs.length === 0}\n            onClick={async () =\u003e {\n              if (selectedKOLs.length === 0) return;\n              const updates = { ...bulkEdit };\n              setKols(prev =\u003e prev.map(kol =\u003e selectedKOLs.includes(kol.id) ? { ...kol, ...updates } : kol));\n              await Promise.all(selectedKOLs.map(kolId =\u003e {\n                const { id, ...fields } = { ...kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId), ...updates };\n                return KOLService.updateKOL({ id: kolId, ...fields });\n              }));\n              setBulkEdit({});\n              setSelectedKOLs([]);\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            Apply\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003cButton\n            size=\"sm\"\n            variant=\"destructive\"\n            disabled={selectedKOLs.length === 0 || isBulkDeleting}\n            onClick={async () =\u003e {\n              if (selectedKOLs.length === 0) return;\n              setIsBulkDeleting(true);\n              const toDelete = selectedKOLs;\n              setKols(prev =\u003e prev.filter(kol =\u003e !toDelete.includes(kol.id)));\n              await Promise.all(toDelete.map(kolId =\u003e KOLService.deleteKOL(kolId)));\n              setSelectedKOLs([]);\n              setIsBulkDeleting(false);\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            Delete\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function KOLsPage() {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handleCellSave = async () =\u003e {\n    if (!editingCell) return;\n    try {\n      const kolToUpdate = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === editingCell.kolId);\n      if (!kolToUpdate) return;\n      const updatedKOL = { ...kolToUpdate, [editingCell.field]: editingValue };\n      const kolId = editingCell.kolId;\n      setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n        prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? updatedKOL : k)\n      );\n      setEditingCell(null);\n      setEditingValue(null);\n      try {\n        await KOLService.updateKOL(updatedKOL);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error('Error updating KOL:', error);\n        setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n          prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? kolToUpdate : k)\n        );\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Error updating KOL:', err);\n      setEditingCell(null);\n      setEditingValue(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCellCancel = () =\u003e {\n    setEditingCell(null);\n    setEditingValue(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async (kolId: string) =\u003e {\n    if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this KOL?')) {\n      try {\n        const kolToDelete = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId);\n        if (!kolToDelete) return;\n        setKols(prevKols =\u003e prevKols.filter(k =\u003e k.id !== kolId));\n        try {\n          await KOLService.deleteKOL(kolId);\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error('Error deleting KOL:', error);\n          setKols(prevKols =\u003e [...prevKols, kolToDelete]);\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error('Error deleting KOL:', err);\n      }\n    }\n  };",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handleCellSave = async () =\u003e {\n    if (!editingCell) return;\n    try {\n      const kolToUpdate = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === editingCell.kolId);\n      if (!kolToUpdate) return;\n      const updatedKOL = { ...kolToUpdate, [editingCell.field]: editingValue };\n      const kolId = editingCell.kolId;\n      setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n        prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? updatedKOL : k)\n      );\n      setEditingCell(null);\n      setEditingValue(null);\n      try {\n        await KOLService.updateKOL(updatedKOL);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error('Error updating KOL:', error);\n        setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n          prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? kolToUpdate : k)\n        );\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Error updating KOL:', err);\n      setEditingCell(null);\n      setEditingValue(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCellCancel = () =\u003e {\n    setEditingCell(null);\n    setEditingValue(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleDelete = async (kolId: string) =\u003e {\n    if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this KOL?')) {\n      try {\n        const kolToDelete = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId);\n        if (!kolToDelete) return;\n        setKols(prevKols =\u003e prevKols.filter(k =\u003e k.id !== kolId));\n        try {\n          await KOLService.deleteKOL(kolId);\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error('Error deleting KOL:', error);\n          setKols(prevKols =\u003e [...prevKols, kolToDelete]);\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error('Error deleting KOL:', err);\n      }\n    }\n  };",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 212
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 162
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function KOLsPage() {\n  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const [kols, setKols] = useState\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\n  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState\u003c{kolId: string, field: keyof MasterKOL} | null\u003e(null);\n  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState\u003cany\u003e(null);\n  const [selectedKOLs, setSelectedKOLs] = useState\u003cstring[]\u003e([]);\n  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [isBulkDeleting, setIsBulkDeleting] = useState(false);\n  const [isSavingNewKOL, setIsSavingNewKOL] = useState(false);\n\n  const fieldOptions = KOLService.getFieldOptions();\n\n  // Multi-select dropdown component\n  const MultiSelect = ({ \n    options, \n    selected, \n    onSelectedChange, \n    placeholder = \"Select options...\",\n    renderOption = (option: string) =\u003e option,\n    className = \"\",\n    triggerContent = null\n  }: {\n    options: string[];\n    selected: string[];\n    onSelectedChange: (selected: string[]) =\u003e void;\n    placeholder?: string;\n    renderOption?: (option: string) =\u003e React.ReactNode;\n    className?: string;\n    triggerContent?: React.ReactNode;\n  }) =\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function KOLsPage() {\n  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();\n  const [kols, setKols] = useState\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\n  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState\u003c{kolId: string, field: keyof MasterKOL} | null\u003e(null);\n  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState\u003cany\u003e(null);\n  const [selectedKOLs, setSelectedKOLs] = useState\u003cstring[]\u003e([]);\n  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cMasterKOL\u003e\u003e({});\n  const [isBulkDeleting, setIsBulkDeleting] = useState(false);\n  const [isSavingNewKOL, setIsSavingNewKOL] = useState(false);\n\n  const fieldOptions = KOLService.getFieldOptions();\n\n  // Multi-select dropdown component\n  const MultiSelect = ({ \n    options, \n    selected, \n    onSelectedChange, \n    placeholder = \"Select options...\",\n    renderOption = (option: string) =\u003e option,\n    className = \"\",\n    triggerContent = null\n  }: {\n    options: string[];\n    selected: string[];\n    onSelectedChange: (selected: string[]) =\u003e void;\n    placeholder?: string;\n    renderOption?: (option: string) =\u003e React.ReactNode;\n    className?: string;\n    triggerContent?: React.ReactNode;\n  }) =\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Checkbox } from \"@/components/ui/checkbox\";\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\";\nimport { Textarea } from \"@/components/ui/textarea\";\nimport { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/popover\";\nimport { Search, Plus, Crown, Save, X, Trash2, Star, Globe, Flag } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { useAuth } from \"@/contexts/AuthContext\";\nimport { KOLService, MasterKOL } from \"@/lib/kolService\";\nimport { Skeleton } from \"@/components/ui/skeleton\";",
        "detailedLines": [

            )}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/PopoverContent\u003e\n        \u003c/Popover\u003e\n      );\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('MultiSelect render error:', = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(null);\n      const fetchedKOLs = await KOLService.getAllKOLs();\n      setKols(fetchedKOLs);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Error fetching KOLs:', err);\n      setError('Failed to load KOLs');\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const filteredKOLs = kols.filter(kol =\u003e\n         "originalContents": "\n        case 'rating':\n          return (\n            \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center space-x-1\"\u003e\n              {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(star =\u003e (\n                \u003cStar\n                  key={star}\n                  className={&#96;h-3 w-3 cursor-pointer ${\n                    star \u003c= (value || 0) ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-300'\n                  }&#96;}\n                  onClick={async (e) =\u003e {\n                    e.preventDefault();\n                    e.stopPropagation();\n                    const kolToUpdate = kols.find(k =\u003e k.id === kolId);\n                    if (kolToUpdate) {\n                      const updatedKOL = { ...kolToUpdate, [field]: star };\n                      setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                        prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? updatedKOL : k)\n                      );\n                      try {\n                        await KOLService.updateKOL(updatedKOL);\n                      } catch (error) {\n                        console.error('Error updating rating:', error);\n                        setKols(prevKols =\u003e \n                          prevKols.map(k =\u003e k.id === kolId ? kolToUpdate : k)\n                        );\n                      }\n                    }\n                  }}\n                /\u003e\n              ))}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          );",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new campaign\n   */\n  static async createCampaign(campaignData: {\n    client_id: string;\n    name: string;\n    total_budget: number;\n    status?: 'Planning' | 'Active' | 'Paused' | 'Completed';\n    start_date: string;\n    end_date: string;\n    description?: string;\n    intro_call?: boolean;\n    intro_call_date?: string | null;\n    region?: string;\n    client_choosing_kols?: boolean;\n    multi_activation?: boolean;\n    manager?: string | null;\n    call_support?: boolean;\n    proposal_sent?: boolean;\n    nda_signed?: boolean;\n    budget_type?: string[];\n  }): Promise\u003cCampaign\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .insert(campaignData)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return data;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport interface CampaignKOLWithDetails extends CampaignKOL {\n  master_kol: {\n    id: string;\n    name: string;\n    link?: string;\n    platform?: string[];\n    followers?: number;\n    region?: string;\n    community?: boolean;\n    content_type?: string[];\n    niche?: string[];\n    pricing?: string;\n    tier?: string;\n    rating?: number;\n    group_chat?: boolean;\n    description?: string;\n  };\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport class CampaignService {\n  /**\n   * Get campaigns based on user role\n   * - Admins: See all campaigns\n   * - Members: See only campaigns for clients they have access to\n   */\n  static async getCampaignsForUser(userRole: 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignWithDetails[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (userRole === 'admin') {\n        // Admins can see all campaigns\n        const { data: campaigns, error } = await supabase\n          .from('campaigns')\n          .select(&#96;\n            *,\n            clients!inner(name, email),\n            campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n          &#96;)\n          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return campaigns?.map(campaign =\u003e ({\n          ...campaign,\n          client_name: (campaign.clients as any)?.name,\n          client_email: (campaign.clients as any)?.email,\n          budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n          total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n        })) || [];\n      } else {\n        // Members can only see campaigns for clients they have access to\n        const { data: campaignAccess, error } = await supabase\n          .from('client_access_members')\n          .select(&#96;\n            campaigns!inner(\n              *,\n              clients!inner(name, email),\n              campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n            )\n          &#96;)\n          .eq('user_id', userId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return campaignAccess?.map(access =\u003e {\n          const campaign = (access as any).campaigns;\n          return {\n            ...campaign,\n            client_name: campaign.clients?.name,\n            client_email: campaign.clients?.email,\n            budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n            total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n          };\n        }).filter(Boolean) || [];\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching campaigns:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        }).filter(Boolean) || [];"
          },

            "lineNumber": 67,

          },

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    } catch (error) {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 69,

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport class CampaignService {\n  /**\n   * Get campaigns based on user role\n   * - Admins: See all campaigns\n   * - Members: See only campaigns for clients they have access to\n   */\n  static async getCampaignsForUser(userRole: 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignWithDetails[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (userRole === 'admin') {\n        // Admins can see all campaigns\n        const { data: campaigns, error } = await supabase\n          .from('campaigns')\n          .select(&#96;\n            *,\n            clients!inner(name, email),\n            campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n          &#96;)\n          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return campaigns?.map(campaign =\u003e ({\n          ...campaign,\n          client_name: (campaign.clients as any)?.name,\n          client_email: (campaign.clients as any)?.email,\n          budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n          total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n        })) || [];\n      } else {\n        // Members can only see campaigns for clients they have access to\n        const { data: campaignAccess, error } = await supabase\n          .from('client_access_members')\n          .select(&#96;\n            campaigns!inner(\n              *,\n              clients!inner(name, email),\n              campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n            )\n          &#96;)\n          .eq('user_id', userId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return campaignAccess?.map(access =\u003e {\n          const campaign = (access as any).campaigns;\n          return {\n            ...campaign,\n            client_name: campaign.clients?.name,\n            client_email: campaign.clients?.email,\n            budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n            total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n          };\n        }).filter(Boolean) || [];\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching campaigns:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 71

            "column": 2,

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport interface CampaignWithDetails extends Campaign {\n  client_name?: string;\n  client_email?: string;\n  budget_allocations?: CampaignBudgetAllocation[];\n  total_allocated?: number;\n}",

        "contents": "export class CampaignService {\n  ...\n  static async getCampaignsForUser(userRole: 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignWithDetails[]\u003e {\n\n  ...\n\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get a single campaign by ID with budget allocations\n   */\n  static async getCampaignById(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignWithDetails | null\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: campaign, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .select(&#96;\n          *,\n          clients!inner(name, email),\n          campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n        &#96;)\n        .eq('id', campaignId)\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (!campaign) return null;\n\n      return {\n        ...campaign,\n        client_name: (campaign.clients as any)?.name,\n        client_email: (campaign.clients as any)?.email,\n        budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n        total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n      };\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get a single campaign by ID with budget allocations\n   */\n  static async getCampaignById(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignWithDetails | null\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: campaign, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .select(&#96;\n          *,\n          clients!inner(name, email),\n          campaign_budget_allocations(*)\n        &#96;)\n        .eq('id', campaignId)\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (!campaign) return null;\n\n      return {\n        ...campaign,\n        client_name: (campaign.clients as any)?.name,\n        client_email: (campaign.clients as any)?.email,\n        budget_allocations: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations || [],\n        total_allocated: campaign.campaign_budget_allocations?.reduce((sum: number, allocation: any) =\u003e sum + allocation.allocated_budget, 0) || 0\n      };\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Update campaign\n   */\n  static async updateCampaign(\n    id: string, \n    updates: Partial\u003cPick\u003cCampaign, 'name' | 'total_budget' | 'status' | 'start_date' | 'end_date' | 'description' | 'region' | 'intro_call' | 'intro_call_date' | 'manager' | 'call_support' | 'client_choosing_kols' | 'multi_activation' | 'proposal_sent' | 'nda_signed' | 'budget_type'\u003e\u003e\n  ): Promise\u003cCampaign\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .update(updates)\n        .eq('id', id)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return data;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error updating campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Update campaign\n   */\n  static async updateCampaign(\n    id: string, \n    updates: Partial\u003cPick\u003cCampaign, 'name' | 'total_budget' | 'status' | 'start_date' | 'end_date' | 'description' | 'region' | 'intro_call' | 'intro_call_date' | 'manager' | 'call_support' | 'client_choosing_kols' | 'multi_activation' | 'proposal_sent' | 'nda_signed' | 'budget_type'\u003e\u003e\n  ): Promise\u003cCampaign\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .update(updates)\n        .eq('id', id)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return data;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error updating campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Get all campaigns for a list of client IDs\n   */\n  static async getCampaignsByClientIds(clientIds: string[]): Promise\u003cCampaign[]\u003e {\n    if (!clientIds.length) return [];\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('campaigns')\n      .select('*')\n      .in('client_id', clientIds);\n    if (error) throw error;\n    return data || [];\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "export class CampaignService {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 264.5,
            "text": "\n\n  ..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "  /**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "   * Get all campaigns for a list of client IDs"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "   */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "  static async getCampaignsByClientIds(clientIds: string[]): Promise\u003cCampaign[]\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "    if (!clientIds.length) return [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "    const { data, error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "      .from('campaigns')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "      .select('*')"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "      .in('client_id', clientIds);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    if (error) throw error;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "    return data || [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Get all campaigns for a list of client IDs\n   */\n  static async getCampaignsByClientIds(clientIds: string[]): Promise\u003cCampaign[]\u003e {\n    if (!clientIds.length) return [];\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('campaigns')\n      .select('*')\n      .in('client_id', clientIds);\n    if (error) throw error;\n    return data || [];\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport class CampaignKOLService {\n  static async getCampaignKOLs(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cCampaignKOLWithDetails[]\u003e {\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('campaign_kols')\n      .select(&#96;\n        *,\n        master_kol:master_kols(*)\n      &#96;)\n      .eq('campaign_id', campaignId)\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n    if (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching campaign KOLs:', error);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch campaign KOLs');\n    }\n\n    return data || [];\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n        Update: {\n          budget_type?: string[] | null\n          call_support?: boolean | null\n          client_choosing_kols?: boolean | null\n          client_id?: string\n          created_at?: string\n          description?: string | null\n          end_date?: string\n          id?: string\n          intro_call?: boolean | null\n          intro_call_date?: string | null\n          manager?: string | null\n          multi_activation?: boolean | null\n          name?: string\n          nda_signed?: boolean | null\n          proposal_sent?: boolean | null\n          region?: string | null\n          start_date?: string\n          status?: string\n          total_budget?: number\n          updated_at?: string\n        }\n      }\n      client_access_members: {\n        Row: {\n          client_id: string\n          created_at: string\n          id: string\n          user_id: string\n        }\n        Insert: {\n          client_id: string\n          created_at?: string\n          id?: string\n          user_id: string\n        }\n        Update: {\n          client_id?: string\n          created_at?: string\n          id?: string\n          user_id?: string\n        }\n      }",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport class ClientService {\n  /**\n   * Get clients based on user role\n   * - Admins: See all clients\n   * - Members: See only clients they have access to via client_access_members\n   */\n  static async getClientsForUser(userRole: 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise\u003cClientWithAccess[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (userRole === 'admin') {\n        // Admins can see all clients\n        const { data: clients, error } = await supabase\n          .from('clients')\n          .select(&#96;\n            *,\n            client_access_members(count),\n            campaigns(count)\n          &#96;)\n          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return clients?.map(client =\u003e ({\n          ...client,\n          member_count: client.client_access_members?.[0]?.count || 0,\n          campaign_count: (client as any).campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0\n        })) || [];\n      } else {\n        // Members can only see clients they have access to\n        const { data: clientAccess, error } = await supabase\n          .from('client_access_members')\n          .select(&#96;\n            clients!inner(\n              id,\n              name,\n              email,\n              location,\n              is_active,\n              created_at,\n              updated_at,\n              campaigns(count)\n            )\n          &#96;)\n          .eq('user_id', userId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return clientAccess?.map(access =\u003e {\n          const client = (access as any).clients;\n          return {\n            ...client,\n            campaign_count: client.campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0\n          };\n        }).filter(Boolean) || [];\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching clients:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport class ClientService {\n  /**\n   * Get clients based on user role\n   * - Admins: See all clients\n   * - Members: See only clients they have access to via client_access_members\n   */\n  static async getClientsForUser(userRole: 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise\u003cClientWithAccess[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (userRole === 'admin') {\n        // Admins can see all clients\n        const { data: clients, error } = await supabase\n          .from('clients')\n          .select(&#96;\n            *,\n            client_access_members(count),\n            campaigns(count)\n          &#96;)\n          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return clients?.map(client =\u003e ({\n          ...client,\n          member_count: client.client_access_members?.[0]?.count || 0,\n          campaign_count: (client as any).campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0\n        })) || [];\n      } else {\n        // Members can only see clients they have access to\n        const { data: clientAccess, error } = await supabase\n          .from('client_access_members')\n          .select(&#96;\n            clients!inner(\n              id,\n              name,\n              email,\n              location,\n              is_active,\n              created_at,\n              updated_at,\n              campaigns(count)\n            )\n          &#96;)\n          .eq('user_id', userId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        return clientAccess?.map(access =\u003e {\n          const client = (access as any).clients;\n          return {\n            ...client,\n            campaign_count: client.campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0\n          };\n        }).filter(Boolean) || [];\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching clients:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignKOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  static async getAvailableKOLs(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cany[]\u003e {\n    // First get the IDs of KOLs already assigned to this campaign\n    const { data: assignedKOLs, error: assignedError } = await supabase\n      .from('campaign_kols')\n      .select('master_kol_id')\n      .eq('campaign_id', campaignId);\n\n    if (assignedError) {\n      console.error('Error fetching assigned KOLs:', assignedError);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch assigned KOLs');\n    }\n\n    // Get the IDs of assigned KOLs\n    const assignedIds = assignedKOLs?.map(kol =\u003e kol.master_kol_id) || [];\n\n    // If no KOLs are assigned, return all KOLs\n    if (assignedIds.length === 0) {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('name');\n\n      if (error) {\n        console.error('Error fetching all KOLs:', error);\n        throw new Error('Failed to fetch KOLs');\n      }\n\n      return data || [];\n    }\n\n    // Get all KOLs that are not in the assigned list\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('master_kols')\n      .select('*')\n      .not('id', 'in', &#96;(${assignedIds.join(',')})&#96;)\n      .order('name');\n\n    if (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching available KOLs:', error);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch available KOLs');\n    }\n\n    return data || [];\n  }",

_**Agent**_

The `contents` table (for campaign content) has these relevant fields for the Add Content form:

- `activation_date` (date)
- `campaign_kols_id` (required, must link to a campaign_kols row)
- `content_link` (string, URL)
- `impressions` (number)
- `likes` (number)
- `retweets` (number)
- `comments` (number)
- `platform` (string, e.g., "X", "Telegram")
- `status` (string, e.g., "Draft", "Published", etc.)
- `type` (string, e.g., "Post", "Video", etc.)

**Plan for the Add Content form:**
- Dropdown to select a KOL (from campaign KOLs for this campaign)
- Date picker for activation date
- Input for content link (URL)
- Number inputs for impressions, likes, retweets, comments
- Dropdown for platform (reuse fieldOptions.platforms)
- Dropdown for type (reuse fieldOptions.contentTypes)
- Dropdown for status (custom: e.g., "Draft", "Published", "Scheduled")

The form will use the same styling as the Add KOLs popup.

I will implement this in the Add Contents dialog now.

        "originalContents": "import { supabase } from './supabase';\n\n// TypeScript types for KOL data\nexport interface MasterKOL {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  link: string | null;\n  platform: string[];\n  followers: number | null;\n  region: 'Vietnam' | 'Turkey' | 'SEA' | 'Philippines' | 'Korea' | 'Global' | 'China' | 'Brazil' | null;\n  community: boolean;\n  content_type: string[];\n  niche: string[];\n  pricing: '\u003c$200' | '$200-500' | '$500-1K' | '$1K-2K' | '$2K-3K' | '\u003e$3K' | null;\n  tier: 'Tier 1' | 'Tier 2' | 'Tier 3' | 'Tier 4' | null;\n  rating: number | null;\n  group_chat: boolean;\n  description: string | null;\n  created_at: string;\n  updated_at: string;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport interface UpdateKOLData {\n  id: string;\n  name?: string;\n  link?: string | null;\n  platform?: string[];\n  followers?: number | null;\n  region?: MasterKOL['region'];\n  community?: boolean;\n  content_type?: string[];\n  niche?: string[];\n  pricing?: MasterKOL['pricing'];\n  tier?: MasterKOL['tier'];\n  rating?: number | null;\n  group_chat?: boolean;\n  description?: string | null;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport class KOLService {\n  /**\n   * Get all KOLs (admin only)\n   */\n  static async getAllKOLs(): Promise\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kols, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kols || [];\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching KOLs:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport class KOLService {\n  /**\n   * Get all KOLs (admin only)\n   */\n  static async getAllKOLs(): Promise\u003cMasterKOL[]\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kols, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kols || [];\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching KOLs:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Format followers count for display\n   */\n  static formatFollowers(followers: number | null): string {\n    if (!followers) return '0';\n    if (followers \u003e= 1000000) {\n      return &#96;${(followers / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M&#96;;\n    }\n    if (followers \u003e= 1000) {\n      return &#96;${(followers / 1000).toFixed(1)}K&#96;;\n    }\n    return followers.toString();\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 56,

            "text": "    if (!followers) return '0';"

            "lineNumber": 153,

        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Format followers count for display\n   */\n  static formatFollowers(followers: number | null): string {\n    if (!followers) return '0';\n    if (followers \u003e= 1000000) {\n      return &#96;${(followers / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M&#96;;\n    }\n    if (followers \u003e= 1000) {\n      return &#96;${(followers / 1000).toFixed(1)}K&#96;;\n    }\n    return followers.toString();\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Update a KOL\n   */\n  static async updateKOL(kolData: UpdateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const updateData: any = { ...kolData };\n      delete updateData.id; // Remove id from update data\n\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .update(updateData)\n        .eq('id', kolData.id)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error updating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Update a KOL\n   */\n  static async updateKOL(kolData: UpdateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const updateData: any = { ...kolData };\n      delete updateData.id; // Remove id from update data\n\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .update(updateData)\n        .eq('id', kolData.id)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error updating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Delete a KOL\n   */\n  static async deleteKOL(kolId: string): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .delete()\n        .eq('id', kolId);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error deleting KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "export class KOLService {"
          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new campaign\n   */\n  static async createCampaign(campaignData: {\n    client_id: string;\n    name: string;\n    total_budget: number;\n    status?: 'Planning' | 'Active' | 'Paused' | 'Completed';\n    start_date: string;\n    end_date: string;\n    description?: string;\n    intro_call?: boolean;\n    intro_call_date?: string | null;\n    region?: string;\n    client_choosing_kols?: boolean;\n    multi_activation?: boolean;\n    manager?: string | null;\n    call_support?: boolean;\n    proposal_sent?: boolean;\n    nda_signed?: boolean;\n    budget_type?: string[];\n  }): Promise\u003cCampaign\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('campaigns')\n        .insert(campaignData)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return data;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating campaign:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class KOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",

            "lineNumber": 100,

            "lineNumber": 101,

            "text": "    } catch (error) {"

            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);"

            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  /**\n   * Create a new KOL\n   */\n  static async createKOL(kolData: CreateKOLData): Promise\u003cMasterKOL\u003e {\n    try {\n      const { data: kol, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .insert([{\n          name: kolData.name,\n          link: kolData.link || null,\n          platform: kolData.platform || [],\n          followers: kolData.followers || null,\n          region: kolData.region || null,\n          community: kolData.community || false,\n          content_type: kolData.content_type || [],\n          niche: kolData.niche || [],\n          pricing: kolData.pricing || null,\n          tier: kolData.tier || null,\n          rating: kolData.rating || null,\n          group_chat: kolData.group_chat || false,\n          description: kolData.description || null\n        }])\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n      return kol;\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error('Error creating KOL:', error);\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 106

            "column": 4,
            "line": 73

        "contents": "export type Json =\n  | string\n  | number\n  | boolean\n  | null\n  | { [key: string]: Json | undefined }\n  | Json[]",

        "originalContents": "export type Json =\n  | string\n  | number\n  | boolean\n  | null\n  | { [key: string]: Json | undefined }\n  | Json[]",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 11,

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export class CampaignKOLService {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  static async getAvailableKOLs(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cany[]\u003e {\n    // First get the IDs of KOLs already assigned to this campaign\n    const { data: assignedKOLs, error: assignedError } = await supabase\n      .from('campaign_kols')\n      .select('master_kol_id')\n      .eq('campaign_id', campaignId);\n\n    if (assignedError) {\n      console.error('Error fetching assigned KOLs:', assignedError);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch assigned KOLs');\n    }\n\n    // Get the IDs of assigned KOLs\n    const assignedIds = assignedKOLs?.map(kol =\u003e kol.master_kol_id) || [];\n\n    // If no KOLs are assigned, return all KOLs\n    if (assignedIds.length === 0) {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('name');\n\n      if (error) {\n        console.error('Error fetching all KOLs:', error);\n        throw new Error('Failed to fetch KOLs');\n      }\n\n      return data || [];\n    }\n\n    // Get all KOLs that are not in the assigned list\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('master_kols')\n      .select('*')\n      .not('id', 'in', &#96;(${assignedIds.join(',')})&#96;)\n      .order('name');\n\n    if (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching available KOLs:', error);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch available KOLs');\n    }\n\n    return data || [];\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  static async getAvailableKOLs(campaignId: string): Promise\u003cany[]\u003e {\n    // First get the IDs of KOLs already assigned to this campaign\n    const { data: assignedKOLs, error: assignedError } = await supabase\n      .from('campaign_kols')\n      .select('master_kol_id')\n      .eq('campaign_id', campaignId);\n\n    if (assignedError) {\n      console.error('Error fetching assigned KOLs:', assignedError);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch assigned KOLs');\n    }\n\n    // Get the IDs of assigned KOLs\n    const assignedIds = assignedKOLs?.map(kol =\u003e kol.master_kol_id) || [];\n\n    // If no KOLs are assigned, return all KOLs\n    if (assignedIds.length === 0) {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('master_kols')\n        .select('*')\n        .order('name');\n\n      if (error) {\n        console.error('Error fetching all KOLs:', error);\n        throw new Error('Failed to fetch KOLs');\n      }\n\n      return data || [];\n    }\n\n    // Get all KOLs that are not in the assigned list\n    const { data, error } = await supabase\n      .from('master_kols')\n      .select('*')\n      .not('id', 'in', &#96;(${assignedIds.join(',')})&#96;)\n      .order('name');\n\n    if (error) {\n      console.error('Error fetching available KOLs:', error);\n      throw new Error('Failed to fetch available KOLs');\n    }\n\n    return data || [];\n  }",
